LogoTrustBar.text: From local businesses to global brands, over 1 million users trust Nextiva.

card1.label: Any Size Business

card1.desc: Built for businesses of any size, from startup to enterprise. Grow your communications without growing complexity.

card2.desc: From frontline employees to the CEO, everyone sees the same actionable, real-time customer insights. That's true unification.

EndOfBusywork.label: NEXT Platform + XBert AI
EndOfBusywork.headline: The End of Busywork.
EndOfBusywork.tagline: The next era for business is built with AI employees.
EndOfBusywork.desc: The shift is already happening. AI employees are handling customer conversations, resolving real issues, closing real deals. The businesses that ride this shift will be impossible to compete with.

MoreImpact.headline:
Less Busywork.
More Impact.
MoreImpact.subhead: XBert handles the routine stuff like customer questions, scheduling, and follow-ups. So your team has more time for the work that actually moves your business forward.

card1.title: Your AI employee handles the busywork.
card1.desc: XBert is agentic AI that handles the busywork autonomously, from first touch to resolution, so your team can focus on work that actually matters.

card2.title: Your team can focus on what humans do best.
card2.desc: Complex problems, high-stakes conversations, relationship building. The moments that earn loyalty and close deals stay with your people.

card3.title: The NEXT Platform brings it all together.
card3.desc: Every tool, channel, and conversation, unified with AI. Full visibility into your customer experience, with smart AI that helps you grow.

card1.title: XBert learns your business.
card1.desc: XBert learns your services, policies, business hours, and FAQs. It's not guessing. It's an expert that knows your business inside and out.

card2.title: You have full control.
card2.desc: Set guardrails and customize what the AI can handle. Calls are recorded and transcribed so you always know what happened.

card3.title: Intelligent handoff.
card3.desc: When needed, XBert transfers complex requests and urgent needs to your team. No awkward pauses or frustrated customers.

card1.desc: Transformed customer communications and dramatically improved team productivity.

FromTheFounder.title: Leading the Conversation on AI
FromTheFounder.name: Tomas Gorny
FromTheFounder.cardTitle: Don't Wait for AI to Be Perfect. It's Already Doing Work.
FromTheFounder.cardDesc: AI learns through action, not hesitation. The companies seeing real results started imperfect and improved along the way.
FromTheFounder.linkedInPost: There's a false expectation that AI should be flawless out of the gate. That it can go from 0-60 in 0.001 seconds. The truth is, AI needs context. Just like teaching a friend a new skill, you start small, test, and adjust. You build that context over time. Mistakes will happen and they're part of how the system gets smarter. The businesses that will win with AI aren't waiting for perfection…
